description: VERIFIED LIVE: BBC News via content-script DOM extraction — no login, no API key. BBC renders story cards in stable [data-testid] markup, so this tool reads the headlines straight from the DOM of your open BBC tab. Navigate the tab to any BBC section (bbc.com/news, /sport, /business, a topic page) and call the tool. Tested live by Claude Code on bbc.com/news: 49 stories with headline, article url and summary extracted correctly.

tools.name: bbc_headlines
tools.description: Story cards on the current BBC page (bbc.com/news, /sport, /business, or any topic/section page). Navigate the tab there first. Returns each story's headline, article url and summary. VERIFIED (49 stories).
